title: Database schema & connection setup
description: Drizzle ORM schema (users, customers, addresses, categories, brands, products, product_variants, orders, order_items, payments, promotions, banners, verification_tokens) and Neon Postgres connection. No lib/db exists yet — this is the foundation every other backend feature depends on.

inScope: Drizzle schema definitions for all tables listed in technical-notes.md (users, customers, addresses, categories, brands, products, product_variants, orders, order_items, payments, promotions, banners, verification_tokens)
Initial Drizzle migration generation and run against Neon
priceCents stored as integer on all money-bearing columns
outOfScope: Read replicas or connection pooling beyond default Neon serverless driver behavior

acceptanceCriteria.text: lib/db exists with a working Drizzle client connected to Neon
Schema covers every table named in technical-notes.md architecture notes
Drizzle migrations run cleanly against a fresh Neon database with `drizzle-kit push` or `migrate`
All price/money columns are integer (cents), never float
